title: CaptureRecord
description: RFC-0024 emergent issue capture record. Immutable once written; auditTrail accumulates state transitions.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version — always 'v1' for this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at capture time.

finding.description: One-line description of the emergent issue.

severity.description: Operator-estimated severity at capture time. Defaults to 'unknown' when not supplied.

triage.description: Triage disposition. 'tbd' = captured but not yet triaged (surfaces in TUI Blockers pane).

agentRole.description: Agent role when type='ai-agent'. Null for operator captures.

operator.description: Operator email / login when type='operator'. Null for agent captures.

context.description: Free-text: what the source was doing when this surfaced.

filePath.description: Repo-relative path to the file where the finding was observed.

prNumber.description: GitHub PR number if the finding originated in a PR.

commentUrl.description: GitHub PR review comment URL if origin was a PR comment.

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA providing context for the finding.

relatedIssueId.description: Adapter-native issue ID this capture is filed against (AISDLC-NNN, LIN-NNN, etc.).

featureIssueCarveRef.description: Path or URL of the Feature Issue (RFC draft) when triage='new-feature-issue'.

blocksIssueId.description: Issue ID gated by this finding (triggers decision-deferred handoff in orchestrator).

createdIssueId.description: Populated when an Issue is created from this capture.

createdFeatureIssueId.description: Populated when a Feature Issue is created from this capture.

resolvedAt.description: Populated when triage flips from 'tbd' to a terminal value.

resolvedBy.description: Operator or agent that resolved the triage.

auditTrail.description: Immutable append-only audit log of state transitions.

action.description: Action taken (captured, triaged, issue-created, feature-issue-created, redacted, etc.).

at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of this action.
